calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leon Ainer for and with Lamont Walton (Administrator).
Endy Ukoha-Ajike appeared by telephone for Monique Walton (Beneficiary).

The Court noted that distributions were made to two of the Beneficiaries without Court permission for over $1,000,000.00, that nothing was distributed to the third Beneficiary and asked Mr. Walton if he is aware that he had no authority to make said distributions. Mr. Ainer stated that he did not know about any of the distributions. Mr. Walton stated that is aware of it now, and that he and his Brother had an emergency situation and were being evicted. Mr. Ainer stated that there is about $230,000.00 left in the estate, that there is enough for the third Beneficiary to receive her full share and that he addressed the Probate Examiner's questions regarding the late charges in his declaration. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Continued To Apr-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Continued To Mar-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Continued To Jan-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike appeared by telephone for Monica Walton (Beneficiary).

Mr. Ukoha-Ajike stated that he is not the Attorney for the Administrator, that he represents a Beneficiary and that he does not know what the status is on final distribution. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike also stated that he has not heard from Counsel, that the last time they spoke Counsel indicated that his Client attempted to do the accounting, that she did not do it properly and that he was seeking help from someone to do the accounting. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on January 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.
